query:
SELECT id, postoId, dataVenda, quantidade, valorUnitario, valorTotal, codigoAcs 
FROM vendas 
WHERE CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 OR CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0
LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT id, postoId, dataVenda, quantidade, valorUnitario, valorTotal, codigoAcs 
FROM vendas 
WHERE CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 OR CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0
LIMIT 20
